---
title: "Muhammad Zamharir"
about: 
  template: trestles
  image: quarto profile.jpg
  image-width: 8cm
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: medium
      text: medium
      href: https://medium.com/@zamharirrojafi
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkeiIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/zamharir-rojafi-898b4817b
    - icon: email
      text: email
      href: mailto:zamharirrojafi@gmail.com
---

Aspiring immunology researcher and biology graduate from Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (ITS), with a strong foundation in herbal medicine development and drug safety testing. Experienced in analyzing immune responses with a particular focus on drug-induced allergic reactions. Driven by a deep interest in drug discovery and the study of metabolic diseases, I aim to bridge traditional medicine insights with modern immunological approaches to advance safer and more effective therapeutic innovations.

## Education

Sepuluh Nopember Institute of Technology (ITS) \| Surabaya, Indonesia Bsc in Biology \| Sept 2020 - Sept 2024
